items.title_en: Bitcoin caps a dismal week as price wallows 50% below its all-time high
items.title_zh: 比特币价格比历史高点低 50%，结束了惨淡的一周
items.desc_en: A rebound in the digital currency, or characteristic dip-buying by investors, is yet to take place.
items.desc_zh: 数字货币的反弹或投资者的典型逢低买入尚未发生。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls rose by 172,000 in May, much more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国5月非农就业人数增加17.2万人，远超预期；失业率为 4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 80,000 in May while the unemployment rate held at 4.3%.
items.desc_zh: 5 月份非农就业人数预计增加 8 万人，失业率维持在 4.3%。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.title_en: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
items.title_zh: 投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”
items.desc_en: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.
items.desc_zh: 高盛资产管理公司 Innovator 首席投资策略师 Tim Urbanowicz 应对人工智能热潮。

items.title_en: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Chipotle, Disney, Robinhood, Coinbase & more

items.title_en: Alphabet is seeking fresh capital as stock's 4-week losing streak tests investor appetite
items.title_zh: 由于股票连续 4 周下跌考验投资者兴趣，Alphabet 正在寻求新资金
items.desc_en: Alphabet expects capex to reach up to $190 billion this year, double last year's spending, and the company is turning to investors to help fund its expansion.
items.desc_zh: Alphabet 预计今年资本支出将达到 1900 亿美元，是去年支出的两倍，该公司正在寻求投资者为其扩张提供资金。

items.title_en: Broadway's $1.9 billion season is the latest sign of consumers splurging on experiences
items.title_zh: 百老汇耗资 19 亿美元的演出季是消费者在体验上挥霍的最新迹象
items.desc_en: Sunday's Tony Awards follow a record-breaking season on Broadway. The awards often lead to further ticket sales for winning shows.
items.desc_zh: 周日的托尼奖颁奖季在百老汇打破了纪录。这些奖项通常会带来获奖演出门票的进一步销售。

items.title_en: Family offices bet on sports, from pickleball leagues to smart soccer balls
items.title_zh: 家族办公室押注体育运动，从匹克球联赛到智能足球
items.desc_en: While AI startups dominate deal-making news, investment firms of the ultra-rich are still keen on sports.
items.desc_zh: 尽管人工智能初创公司主导了交易新闻，但超级富豪的投资公司仍然热衷于体育运动。

items.title_en: No tech, no problem. Dow makes record and traders think these stocks can lead now
items.title_zh: 没有技术，没问题。道琼斯指数创历史新高，交易员认为这些股票现在可以领先
items.desc_en: Traders bought about 5,300 calls in the State Street Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLV) on Thursday, compared to just over 1,000 puts, according to data from ThinkOrSwim.
items.desc_zh: ThinkOrSwim 的数据显示，周四，交易员买入了道富医疗精选板块 SPDR ETF (XLV) 约 5,300 份看涨期权，而看跌期权仅略多于 1,000 份。

items.title_en: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
items.title_zh: 儿童谋杀案嫌疑人犯罪记录公布后法国愤怒
items.desc_en: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.
items.desc_zh: 记录显示，一名涉嫌谋杀一名 11 岁女孩的男子此前已被确定为潜在的儿童猥亵者。

items.title_en: U.S. Senate passes $70 billion in new funds for ICE, Border Patrol
items.title_zh: 美国参议院通过 700 亿美元新资金用于 ICE 和边境巡逻队
items.desc_en: Nearly all of the funding would go to DHS's ICE and Border Patrol agencies that are carrying out the Trump admin's vigorous deportations throughout the U.S.

items.desc_en: After a glioblastoma diagnosis, value investor Guy Spier rethought wealth, time and legacy — and the impact he can have on rare disease research.
items.desc_zh: 在诊断出胶质母细胞瘤后，价值投资者盖伊·斯皮尔重新思考了财富、时间和遗产，以及他对罕见疾病研究的影响。

items.desc_zh: 自周二以来，泽纳布·贾瓦德利 (Zeynab Javadli) 就没有与她的任何朋友联系。

items.title_en: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基在给普京的公开信中提议进行面对面会谈
items.desc_en: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统告诉俄罗斯领导人，只有两国之间的“直接接触”才能结束战争，而美国的重点是伊朗。

items.title_en: John Bolton expected to plead guilty in classified documents case, sources confirm - BBC
items.title_zh: 消息人士证实，约翰·博尔顿预计将在机密文件案中认罪 - BBC
items.desc_en: John Bolton expected to plead guilty in classified documents case, sources confirm  BBCJohn Bolton, Ex-Trump Adviser, Reaches Deal to Plead Guilty Over Classified Information  The New York TimesExclus
items.desc_zh: 消息人士证实，约翰·博尔顿预计将在机密文件案中认罪，前特朗普顾问约翰·博尔顿就机密信息达成认罪协议

items.title_en: Dutch police investigate suspected drugging and sexual assault of multiple women
items.title_zh: 荷兰警方调查多名女性涉嫌吸毒和性侵事件
items.desc_en: Police raided the suspects' homes after tip-offs from German and UK authorities.
items.desc_zh: 在接到德国和英国当局的举报后，警方突击搜查了嫌疑人的家。

items.title_en: Inside the $850 million Obama Presidential Center ahead of its Juneteenth opening
items.title_zh: 耗资 8.5 亿美元的奥巴马总统中心在 6 月 1 日开幕前夕的内部
items.desc_en: President Obama's library will cost $30 to visit, making it the most expensive presidential museum or library in modern history.
items.desc_zh: 奥巴马总统的图书馆参观费用为 30 美元，成为现代史上最昂贵的总统博物馆或图书馆。

items.title_en: Marilyn Monroe auction features star's make-up and gowns on 100th birthday
items.title_zh: 玛丽莲·梦露 100 岁生日拍卖会展出明星的化妆品和礼服
items.desc_en: The auction has already brought in thousands in bids and includes intimate items from her life.
items.desc_zh: 此次拍卖已经吸引了数千人的竞拍，其中包括她生活中的私密物品。

items.title_en: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon
items.title_zh: 真主党拒绝以色列和黎巴嫩同意重新停火
items.desc_en: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.
items.desc_zh: 经过新一轮谈判后，美国于周三晚上宣布停火协议。

items.title_en: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
items.title_zh: 众议院就伊朗问题斥责特朗普后，特朗普回击“不爱国”投票
items.desc_en: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.
items.desc_zh: 国会下议院通过了一项旨在停止进一步军事行动的措施，此次投票在很大程度上被视为象征性的。

items.title_zh: Microsoft MAI-Voice-2

items.desc_zh: 具有 15 种语言语音克隆功能的富有表现力的 TTS

items.title_en: Exams watchdog warns of rise in high-tech cheating
items.title_zh: 考试监管机构警告高科技作弊现象增多
items.desc_en: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.
items.desc_zh: Ofqual 负责人表示，监考人员正在接受培训，以检测智能眼镜和隐藏式耳机等设备。

items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界上最富有的人，他利用自己的平台在广泛的话题上表达了自己的观点。

items.desc_zh: 通过开放权重、布局控制生成设计就绪图像

items.title_en: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
items.title_zh: 研究称火车上的电话信号大多数时候都不够好
items.desc_en: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 发现主要电话网络在火车上信号不佳，火车公司也降低了 Wi-Fi 速度。

items.title_en: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage
items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断
items.desc_en: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。

items.desc_en: Cut, extract, mute, and split videos locally
items.desc_zh: 本地剪切、提取、静音和分割视频

items.title_en: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
items.title_zh: 英国的出版商可以选择退出 Google AI 搜索结果
items.desc_en: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".
items.desc_zh: 竞争与市场管理局表示，这将使出版商“在与谷歌谈判内容交易时处于更有利的地位”。

items.desc_zh: 跟踪 Apple Music 实际播放的内容

items.title_en: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
items.title_zh: 您是否发现自己漫无目的地滚动？你并不孤单
items.desc_en: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.
items.desc_zh: Virgin Media O2 的一份报告显示，平均 36% 的人花在手机上的时间没有明确的目的。

items.title_en: Microsoft testing wearable AI gadget aimed at office workers
items.title_zh: 微软测试针对上班族的可穿戴人工智能设备
items.desc_en: The company said its own workers are testing a "wearable access badge" and a desktop device.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，其员工正在测试“可穿戴访问徽章”和桌面设备。
